contract_summary: Creates a new amdgpu_task_info object and assigns it to vm->task_info, initializing its kref reference count to 1 (initial reference). On success, the caller acquires ownership of the allocated object with one reference; the object must eventually be released via a matching kref_put (or similar) when no longer needed. On failure (allocation failure), vm->task_info remains unchanged and the caller must not attempt to use it. This is the creation/set lifecycle stage.
